metadata.description: Global Mind Solution plugin marketplace for Claude Code and Claude Cowork. Plugins: acs (Claude Code agentic workflow — autonomous coding skills: PRD, architecture, specs, TDD, PR, merge) and tabp (Cowork screen-cvs — CV screening with weighted scoring, fairness guardrails, and Excel scorecard). Plugin updates are per-plugin versioned (see each plugin's CHANGELOG.md).

plugins.name: acs
plugins.description: Autonomous Coding Skills - an agentic software-delivery workflow: PRD, architecture, tickets, design, specs, TDD implementation with review loop, PR, and merge; hook-gated, resumable, workspace-backed.

plugins.name: tabp
plugins.description: TABP team toolkit for Claude Cowork — a skills-only plugin starting with screen-cvs, a skill that screens CVs against a job description with weighted scoring, fairness guardrails, and an Excel scorecard.
